channel.title: GitHub Nushell Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Nushell in GitHub

item.title: omerxx/dotfiles
item.description: My dotfiles synced from localhost and remote machines

item.title: nushell/nu_scripts
item.description: A place to share Nushell scripts with each other

item.title: luccahuguet/yazelix
item.description: zellij, yazi with nushell/lua/nix scripting add a File Tree to Helix or your prefered editor. An IDE-like experience, in the terminal
